quick_skim.title: Towards Active Real-to-Twin Inspection: A New Paradigm for Zero-Shot Anomaly Detection
quick_skim.abstract: The deployment of zero-shot anomaly detection (AD) in embodied industrial inspection is severely bottlenecked by its reliance on passive, fixed-viewpoint 2D imagery. Such formulations inherently fail to accommodate the active, dynamic observations required in real-world environments. To break this limitation, we introduce Real-to-Twin Anomaly Detection, a novel task that evaluates physical observations directly against geometrically matched CAD Digital Twins. To tackle this new task, we propose AVATAR, a framework designed to learn robust semantic alignment between Real and Digital Twins. By bridging benign Sim2Real domain gaps using only defect-free pairs, AVATAR effectively transforms CAD priors into dynamic, anomaly-free references. This elegant formulation enables the model to localize diverse anomalies in a zero-shot manner as unalignable deviations, eliminating the need for defect annotations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AVATAR substantially outperforms adapted state-of-the-art baselines, exhibiting exceptional robustness to severe viewpoint variations. The code and dataset will be made publicly available.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: CAD digital twin-based anomaly detection for industrial inspection
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 基于CAD数字孪生的工业异常检测
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 基于CAD数字孪生的工业异常检测
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 基于CAD数字孪生的工业异常检测
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Introduces Real-to-Twin anomaly detection, a zero-shot method that compares real observations with CAD digital twins to find anomalies, improving inspection in dynamic environments.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对工业检测中被动式视觉检测的局限性，提出Real-to-Twin异常检测新范式，通过将实物观测与CAD数字孪生进行几何匹配，实现零样本异常检测。框架AVATAR利用无缺陷样本训练，学习真实与数字孪生之间的语义对齐，将CAD先验转化为动态的无异常参考，在主动式、动态观测场景中显著提升了检测精度与泛化能力，为卫星地面装配等高精度制造过程的在线质量监控提供了新方法。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对工业检测中被动式视觉检测的局限性，提出Real-to-Twin异常检测新范式，通过将实物观测与CAD数字孪生进行几何匹配，实现零样本异常检测。框架AVATAR利用无缺陷样本训练，学习真实与数字孪生之间的语义对齐，将CAD先验转化为动态的无异常参考，在主动式、动态观测场景中显著提升了检测精度与泛化能力，为卫星地面装配等高精度制造过程的在线质量监控提供了新方法。
